content_blocks.text:
Comparison between Normal production
& Ab-normal production
Case of the changes in the feedrate (80%)
Created: R. Busi – 26/02/26 Analyse XQuality CETIM Cluses-Février 2026-Feedrate 80 per cent-v4.pptx
Updated: R. Busi – 06/03/26

& Ab-normal production

content_blocks.text: Raw Data

content_blocks.text:
Batch #1 & #2:
• Part #7 to Part #60: Normal process conditions
• Part #61 to Part #70: Feedrate reduced to 80%
• Part #71 to Part #75: 316L grade instead of 303 grade
• Part #76 to Part #77: Normal process conditions for tool wear changes verification (if any)
• Part #78 to Part #81: Tool references mistakes (voluntary)
© Cetim 2024, toute reproduction, traduction ou interprétation des supports de formation RÉFÉRENCE SUPPORT: TITRE DU CHAPITRE:
